artPrompt: A widescreen noir film-still of a goblin don seated at the head of a dim back-room table, one hand raised in a small commanding gesture while cowed goblin underlings around him all stiffly raise a single hand in obedient unison; a hanging amber lamp pools warm light over the ritual, cigar smoke coiling upward, ink-black shadows pressing in, coerced consensus, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: The Don Says Vote Yes
text:
Each opponent who owes you a Favor votes however you tell them on the next vote this turn, and you may sacrifice one of those Favors per opponent to make them do it again on the vote after that.
If no vote is held this turn, hold one anyway: vote on whether the Don is a generous goblin. The Don wins. The Don always wins.
flavorText: Turnout was one hundred percent. Enthusiasm was strongly encouraged.
